name: Southern French Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Tomato, ripe and flavorful, cut into 4 slices
1 small Log of goat cheese, cut into 4 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn on your broiler and adjust the rack to about 6 inches from the heat.
2. In a large, heavy oven-proof skillet, heat the oil until hot and almost smoking.
3. Add the chicken breasts and sauté them over medium heat until lightly browned on one side, about 3 minutes.
4. Turn the breasts, season with salt and pepper, and place a slice of tomato and a piece of cheese on top of each cooked side of breast.
5. Drizzle with olive oil, season with black pepper, and cook for about 1 minute.
6. Transfer the pan to the broiler and cook until the cheese is hot and starts to melt slightly on top.
7. Remove the pan, sprinkle with basil, and serve immediately.
